scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event-loop blocking issue; 200 req/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained with quantified blocking time; async parsing recommended (with worker thread alternative); early-response + failure inconsistency noted as a separate Critical finding with detailed reproduction steps; idempotency concern noted as an important issue; safe_to_deploy is false. Kobe also found a bonus issue (deliveryMap key collision) that wasn't in the rubric but is a legitimate bug.

observations.text: Synchronous XML parsing correctly identified as Critical with quantified impact (50ms per parse, ~165ms/sec blockage at peak load)
Event loop saturation mechanism clearly explained with concrete reproduction steps using perf_hooks
Async fix recommended with multiple options (xml2js.parseStringPromise, fast-xml-parser, worker_threads)
Early-response issue elevated to Critical with excellent reasoning — 200 ACK before processing means carrier won't retry on failure, causing silent data loss
Idempotency concern noted with specific failure mode (status regression from out-of-order events)
safe_to_deploy is false with clear rollback risk assessment (lost events are unrecoverable)
Bonus finding: deliveryMap key collision bug (keyed by trackingNumber instead of delivery.id) is a genuine logic bug not in the rubric — demonstrates thorough code reading
High confidence areas and assumptions are well-calibrated and transparent
